description: Dashboard-style rows with horizontal intensity bars for quantitative dimensions. Each row shows a title, category badge, intensity bar scaled to a configurable ordinal scale, and an expandable description. Optimized for rapid visual scanning of frequency, strength, severity, centrality, and importance distributions.

title_field.description: Field name for the row title

subtitle_field.description: Field name for the category badge

intensity_field.description: Field name for the intensity value (mapped to bar width)

intensity_scale.description: Ordered list of intensity levels from lowest to highest, e.g. ['low', 'medium', 'high'] or ['rare', 'occasional', 'frequent']

description_field.description: Field name for the expandable description

sort_by_intensity.description: Whether to sort rows by intensity value (highest first)

section_description.description: Optional description shown above the matrix
